name: @cozanet/core
description: Core kernel, low-level process, and resource management engine.

name: @cozanet/agents
description: Dynamic agent runners, behavior state trees, lifecycle controllers, and orchestration.

name: @cozanet/api
description: API Gateway, credentials vault, provider routing, cost/usage tracking, and SDK manager.

name: @cozanet/apps
description: User productivity applications, email, calendar, notes, task-lists, and dashboard apps.

name: @cozanet/automation
description: Workflow automation, scheduled background tasks, recurring jobs, and trigger queue manager.

name: @cozanet/browser
description: Secure, autonomous headless browser workspace, scraping, form filling, and session controller.

name: @cozanet/communication
description: Communication system hub integrating Gmail, Outlook, slack, messaging, and chat channels.

name: @cozanet/cx7
description: CX7 Visual Intelligence engine for dynamic programmable canvas and immersive interactive layouts.

name: @cozanet/database
description: Structured transactional, time-series, and config DB manager with semantic search hooks.

name: @cozanet/development
description: Developer toolkit with auto-code completion, tests runner, refactoring, and CI/CD tools.

name: @cozanet/device
description: Device management ledger for connected local and remote IoT, hardware, and mobile devices.

name: @cozanet/filesystem
description: Virtual filesystem orchestrator supporting cloud sync, hot backup, and file watcher events.

name: @cozanet/identity
description: Decentralized identity engine handling account registries, passkeys, MFA, and OAuth vaults.

name: @cozanet/learning
description: Continuous learning and habit profiling engine that personalizes actions based on user behavior.

name: @cozanet/memory
description: Decoupled multi-tiered vector, semantic, episodic, and conversation memory architecture.

name: @cozanet/monitoring
description: Telemetry and monitoring hub tracking performance, alerts, traces, and metrics diagnostics.

name: @cozanet/multimodal
description: Multimodal perception engine for real-time speech, audio, image, video, and OCR understanding.

name: @cozanet/os
description: CozanetOS root repository acting as the monorepo coordinator and bootstrap controller.

name: @cozanet/plugins
description: Sandboxed runtime plugin system with third-party cognitive tools and marketplace capabilities.

name: @cozanet/security
description: Cryptographic engine isolation, audit logging, vulnerability scanners, and key controllers.

name: @cozanet/shared
description: Common typings, protocol models, messaging schemas, and utility constants used across all modules.

name: @cozanet/terminal
description: Intelligent sandboxed terminal execution controller supporting system commands and history.

name: @cozanet/workspaces
description: Adaptive visual workspace layouts and multi-view orchestrator integrating all system views.
